title: OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT LEBANON OUTPATIENT ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prevention and treatment services for alcohol, drug, and gambling addiction. Treatment services include substance use disorder assessment and counseling, juvenile drug court treatment, gambling counseling, and referrals to residential treatment and other resources. Prevention services include education in schools and the community. 1600 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 973555414 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm. Evening treatment groups available Monday-Thursday. Other evening appointments by arrangement. Email (541) 451-5932 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 451-5932 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Varies by service. No fee for gambling treatment. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Problem Gambling Treatment: Benton and Linn Counties Alcohol and Drug Treatment: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Van transportation to and from treatment groups from various Linn County locations available. Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Gambling Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN COUNTY ALCOHOL AND DRUG PREVENTION TREATMENT LEBANON
